privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env build_fbi_json_extractor task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target directory structure requirements and expected file paths exactly match the prompt description.
